name: simplepower
description: Simple Power is a Codex-only skills workflow for brainstorming, plan-first planning, parallel implementation, and read-only code discussion.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-only brainstorming, planning, and parallel implementation workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Simple Power to guide Codex through brainstorming, authoritative implementation planning, plan-first parallel file edits, quick verification, one BEST-tier review+fix pass, final verification, and an explicit read-only code discussion mode.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build with Codex.
Let's plan this work with Simple Power.
